# ona_security_policy (List Resource)

Lists Ona security policies.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "ona_security_policy" "all" {
  provider         = ona
  include_resource = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Organization ID to list security policies for. Defaults to the authenticated organization.
- `search` (String) Search string for filtering security policies by name.
- `security_policy_ids` (List of String) Security policy IDs to include. The API accepts at most 25 IDs.
